view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 3 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires deterministic validation of the persona scenario regarding activity attribution, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the expected behavior or outcome. The linked use case outlines the need for tracking referrals and attribution, yet the evidence does not include any specific checks or data that would allow for a definitive validation of the scenario's success or failure. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive assessment regarding the requirement's fulfillment.
